---
output:
  md_document:
    variant: gfm+tex_math_dollars
---

# MCPower validation — Model-based crossing estimate

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
# Run from mcpower/validation/ (rmarkdown::render sets wd to this file's dir).
source("common.R")     # build_model, parse_effects
source("tolerances.R") # CROSSING_TOL — the central L3 crossing gate
source("formulas.R")   # CROSS_CASES — the case list shared with regression.R

# Full-size campaign knobs (smoke-test with reduced values: N_SIMS_DENSE=2000,
# BY_DENSE=10, N_SIMS_COARSE=800 — knit once to verify, then restore):
N_SIMS_DENSE  <- 100000L   # dense ground-truth sims (MC error ~0.3% at N=100)
BY_DENSE      <- 2L        # dense grid step
N_SIMS_COARSE <- 1600L     # coarse auto-grid sims (default campaign cadence)
FROM_SIZE     <- 20L
TO_SIZE       <- 300L

# Seeds — MCPower-golden discipline: committed seeds so the results are
# reproducible; changing them changes the validation data (not a regression).
SEED_DENSE  <- 2137L
SEED_COARSE <- 2138L       # different seed so the two runs are independent
```

# What this report shows

The model-based crossing feature fits an isotonic (PAVA) regression of the
simulated power-vs-N curve and reports the interpolated N where the fit
crosses the target — this is `n_achievable`, the headline "Required N". The
fit also provides a Wilson-band 95% CI on that crossing, rounded outward to
integers (`ci_lo`, `ci_hi`).

This report checks that the coarse default grid (~12 auto-placed points at
1 600 sims) agrees with a dense ground truth (step-2 grid at 100 000 sims):

- **Accuracy gate:** |coarse n_achievable − dense n_achievable| / dense ≤ `CROSSING_TOL$n_rel`.
- **Coverage gate:** `[floor(ci_lo), ceiling(ci_hi)]` brackets the dense crossing.

Cases: OLS two-predictor (`cross_ols`), logistic two-predictor (`cross_glm`),
LME random-intercept (`cross_lme`), and OLS with a small second effect
(`cross_partial`) where x2=0.05 is NOT expected to reach 80% within the grid.

# How the check works

1. **Dense run** — `by = 2` over `[FROM_SIZE, TO_SIZE]` at `N_SIMS_DENSE` sims.
   The dense empirical crossing per target is `n_achievable` from `fitted`.
2. **Coarse run** — auto-grid (~12 points) at `N_SIMS_COARSE` sims.
   The coarse estimate is `n_achievable` + `[ci_lo, ci_hi]` from `fitted`.
3. Gates are computed per **fitted** target from the two runs.

# The thresholds

| Quantity | Allowed difference | Why |
|---|---|---|
| `n_rel` | ≤ `CROSSING_TOL$n_rel` = `r CROSSING_TOL$n_rel` | Relative band on \|coarse − dense\| / dense. Smoke measured worst: 0.023 (4× safety → 0.10). |
| CI coverage | boolean | [floor(ci_lo), ceil(ci_hi)] must contain the dense truth. |

```{r run-cases, cache=FALSE, results='asis'}
# Helper: build an MCPower (not Debug) from a CROSS_CASES entry — the crossing
# feature uses find_sample_size, a public orchestrator entry point.
build_cross_model <- function(cc) {
  m <- MCPower$new(cc$formula)
  m$set_effects(cc$effects)
  if (!is.null(cc$baseline_probability)) m$set_baseline_probability(cc$baseline_probability)
  if (!is.null(cc$cluster)) {
    cl <- cc$cluster
    m$set_cluster(cl$var, ICC = cl$ICC,
                  n_clusters = cl$n_clusters %||% NULL,
                  cluster_size = cl$cluster_size %||% NULL)
  }
  m
}

# Figures land beside this report's md in the published web tree (md is rendered
# with output_dir = web/documentation/validation, so "figures/<x>.png" resolves
# at the served page — mirrors data_generation.rmd).
figdir_src <- "figures"
figdir_out <- file.path("..", "web", "documentation", "validation", figdir_src)
dir.create(figdir_out, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
png_type <- if (capabilities("cairo")) "cairo" else "Xlib"

# One power-vs-N panel per fitted target: the dense 100k-sim curve is the ground
# truth; the coarse 1600-sim grid is what the shipped default actually sees. The
# check this report makes — that the cheap coarse fit's crossing lands on the dense
# truth — is a claim about where two vertical lines fall, which a table of
# "Dense_N=55, Coarse_N=58" states but a curve crossing the target line *shows*.
# power_uncorrected is indexed [per-N][per-target]; these cases have no contrasts,
# so target i (1-based, marginals first) is column i of each per-N vector.
plot_crossing <- function(dense_res, coarse_res, target_labels, target_power) {
  fitted_i <- which(vapply(seq_along(target_labels), function(i)
    identical(dense_res$fitted[[as.character(i - 1L)]]$status, "fitted"), logical(1)))
  if (!length(fitted_i)) return(invisible(NULL))
  dN <- as.numeric(dense_res$sample_sizes)
  cN <- as.numeric(coarse_res$sample_sizes)
  op <- graphics::par(mfrow = c(1, length(fitted_i)), mar = c(4, 4, 2.5, 1))
  on.exit(graphics::par(op))
  for (i in fitted_i) {
    key  <- as.character(i - 1L)
    dpow <- vapply(dense_res$power_uncorrected,  function(v) as.numeric(v)[i], numeric(1))
    cpow <- vapply(coarse_res$power_uncorrected, function(v) as.numeric(v)[i], numeric(1))
    df   <- dense_res$fitted[[key]]; cf <- coarse_res$fitted[[key]]
    graphics::plot(dN, dpow, type = "n", ylim = c(0, 1),
                   xlab = "sample size N", ylab = "power", main = target_labels[i])
    if (!is.null(cf$ci_lo) && !is.null(cf$ci_hi))
      graphics::rect(cf$ci_lo, 0, cf$ci_hi, 1, border = NA,
                     col = grDevices::rgb(0.20, 0.40, 0.70, 0.12))   # coarse 95% CI on the crossing
    graphics::abline(h = target_power, col = "grey60", lty = 3)
    graphics::lines(dN, dpow, lwd = 2, col = "grey35")                # dense ground truth
    graphics::points(cN, cpow, pch = 16, col = grDevices::rgb(0.20, 0.40, 0.70, 0.9))  # coarse grid
    graphics::abline(v = df$n_achievable, col = "red",  lwd = 2)               # dense crossing (truth)
    graphics::abline(v = cf$n_achievable, col = "blue", lwd = 2, lty = 2)      # coarse model-based crossing
  }
}

# Accumulate one gate table row per (case, target).
all_rows <- list()

for (cc in CROSS_CASES) {
  cat(sprintf("\n# Case: %s\n\n", cc$label))

  m <- build_cross_model(cc)

  # Dense run.
  dense_res <- m$find_sample_size(
    from_size = FROM_SIZE, to_size = TO_SIZE, by = BY_DENSE,
    n_sims = N_SIMS_DENSE, seed = SEED_DENSE,
    verbose = FALSE, progress_callback = FALSE
  )
  dense_fitted <- dense_res$fitted

  # Coarse run (auto-grid: no `by` argument).
  coarse_res <- m$find_sample_size(
    from_size = FROM_SIZE, to_size = TO_SIZE,
    n_sims = N_SIMS_COARSE, seed = SEED_COARSE,
    verbose = FALSE, progress_callback = FALSE
  )
  coarse_fitted <- coarse_res$fitted

  # cluster_atom > 1 for LME: the engine rounds to the nearest multiple.
  cat(sprintf("cluster_atom: dense=%d  coarse=%d\n\n",
              dense_res$cluster_atom, coarse_res$cluster_atom))

  target_labels <- names(parse_effects(cc$effects))
  n_targets <- length(target_labels)

  # Identify which target is the deliberately small / not-fitted one.
  # For cross_partial, the last effect (x2=0.05) is the partial target.
  partial_label <- if (cc$label == "cross_partial") target_labels[n_targets] else NULL

  rows <- lapply(seq_len(n_targets), function(i) {
    key   <- as.character(i - 1L)
    d     <- dense_fitted[[key]]
    c_fit <- coarse_fitted[[key]]
    lbl   <- target_labels[i]

    # For the partial target, not-fitted in dense is expected; skip accuracy gate.
    is_partial_target <- !is.null(partial_label) && lbl == partial_label
    dense_fitted_ok   <- d$status == "fitted"
    coarse_fitted_ok  <- c_fit$status == "fitted"

    dense_n   <- if (dense_fitted_ok)  d$n_achievable  else NA_integer_
    coarse_n  <- if (coarse_fitted_ok) c_fit$n_achievable else NA_integer_

    rel_diff <- if (!is.na(dense_n) && !is.na(coarse_n)) {
      abs(coarse_n - dense_n) / dense_n
    } else NA_real_
    acc_ok <- if (is_partial_target) NA else {
      # Designed-to-fit target: require both fitted and within tolerance.
      dense_fitted_ok && coarse_fitted_ok && !is.na(rel_diff) &&
        rel_diff <= CROSSING_TOL$n_rel
    }

    ci_lo_int <- if (!is.null(c_fit$ci_lo)) floor(c_fit$ci_lo) else NA_integer_
    ci_hi_int <- if (!is.null(c_fit$ci_hi)) ceiling(c_fit$ci_hi) else NA_integer_
    cov_ok <- if (is_partial_target || is.na(dense_n)) NA else {
      !is.na(ci_lo_int) && !is.na(ci_hi_int) &&
        ci_lo_int <= dense_n && dense_n <= ci_hi_int
    }

    data.frame(
      Case          = cc$label,
      Target        = lbl,
      Partial       = is_partial_target,
      Dense_status  = d$status,
      Dense_N       = dense_n,
      Coarse_status = c_fit$status,
      Coarse_N      = coarse_n,
      Rel_diff      = if (!is.na(rel_diff)) round(rel_diff, 4) else NA_real_,
      Acc_threshold = CROSSING_TOL$n_rel,
      Acc_PASS      = acc_ok,
      CI            = sprintf("[%s, %s]",
                              if (is.na(ci_lo_int)) "NA" else ci_lo_int,
                              if (is.na(ci_hi_int)) "NA" else ci_hi_int),
      Cov_PASS      = cov_ok,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
  case_table <- do.call(rbind, rows)
  all_rows <- c(all_rows, list(case_table))

  cat(knitr::kable(case_table[, c("Target", "Partial", "Dense_status", "Dense_N",
                                   "Coarse_status", "Coarse_N", "Rel_diff",
                                   "Acc_PASS", "CI", "Cov_PASS")],
                   caption = sprintf("Crossing gates — %s", cc$label),
                   format = "pipe"), sep = "\n")
  cat("\n\n")

  # Power-vs-N figure for this case (skipped if no target is fitted, e.g. a
  # fully not-reached case). target_power is reported on the 0–100 percent scale
  # while power_uncorrected is a 0–1 proportion — rescale so the target line and
  # the curve share an axis.
  tp_raw <- dense_res$target_power %||% 80
  tp <- if (tp_raw > 1) tp_raw / 100 else tp_raw
  if (any(vapply(seq_len(n_targets), function(i)
        identical(dense_fitted[[as.character(i - 1L)]]$status, "fitted"), logical(1)))) {
    fpath <- file.path(figdir_out, paste0(cc$label, ".png"))
    fw    <- max(4, 3 * sum(vapply(seq_len(n_targets), function(i)
              identical(dense_fitted[[as.character(i - 1L)]]$status, "fitted"), logical(1))))
    grDevices::png(fpath, width = fw * 120, height = 340, res = 96, type = png_type)
    plot_crossing(dense_res, coarse_res, target_labels, tp)
    grDevices::dev.off()
    cat(sprintf("![Power vs N for %s: dense ground truth, coarse grid, and the model-based crossing.](%s)\n\n",
                cc$label, file.path(figdir_src, paste0(cc$label, ".png"))))
    cat(sprintf("*Grey curve = dense %s-sim ground truth; blue dots = coarse %s-sim default grid; dotted line = %g target power. Red line = dense crossing (truth), blue dashed = coarse model-based crossing, shaded band = its 95%% CI.*\n\n",
                format(N_SIMS_DENSE, big.mark = ","), format(N_SIMS_COARSE, big.mark = ","), tp))
  }

  # Diagnostics.
  cat(sprintf("Dense run:  sample_sizes %d - %d, %d points, %d sims\n",
              min(as.numeric(dense_res$sample_sizes)),
              max(as.numeric(dense_res$sample_sizes)),
              length(dense_res$sample_sizes),
              dense_res$n_sims))
  cat(sprintf("Coarse run: sample_sizes %d - %d, %d points, %d sims\n",
              min(as.numeric(coarse_res$sample_sizes)),
              max(as.numeric(coarse_res$sample_sizes)),
              length(coarse_res$sample_sizes),
              coarse_res$n_sims))
  cat("\n")

  # cross_partial: assert the partial target is NOT fitted (expected behaviour).
  if (cc$label == "cross_partial") {
    partial_row <- case_table[case_table$Target == partial_label, , drop = FALSE]
    if (partial_row$Dense_status == "fitted")
      stop(sprintf("cross_partial: expected x2 target NOT fitted in dense run (too small to reach 80%%); got status='fitted', n=%d",
                   partial_row$Dense_N))
    cat(sprintf("cross_partial: partial target (%s) is not-fitted as expected (status=%s).\n\n",
                partial_label, partial_row$Dense_status))
  }

  # Gate: all DESIGNED-TO-FIT targets (non-partial) must pass acc + cov.
  fit_rows <- case_table[!case_table$Partial, , drop = FALSE]
  stat_fail <- any(fit_rows$Dense_status != "fitted" | fit_rows$Coarse_status != "fitted")
  # isTRUE is not vectorised; use direct logical negation (NA -> TRUE, which triggers failure).
  acc_fail  <- any(!fit_rows$Acc_PASS %in% TRUE)
  cov_fail  <- any(!fit_rows$Cov_PASS %in% TRUE)
  if (stat_fail)
    stop(sprintf("[%s] Expected status=='fitted' for all designed-to-fit targets in both runs.", cc$label))
  if (acc_fail)
    stop(sprintf("[%s] Accuracy gate FAILED: max rel_diff = %.4f > %.4f",
                 cc$label, max(fit_rows$Rel_diff, na.rm = TRUE), CROSSING_TOL$n_rel))
  if (cov_fail)
    stop(sprintf("[%s] Coverage gate FAILED: CI does not bracket the dense crossing.", cc$label))

  # Freeze dense fitted crossings for the fitted targets to data/<label>.golden.rds.
  # Stores per-target dense n_achievable keyed by target label; regression.R
  # loads this and compares the cheap coarse run within CROSSING_TOL$n_rel.
  dense_golden <- lapply(seq_len(n_targets), function(i) {
    key <- as.character(i - 1L)
    d   <- dense_fitted[[key]]
    list(status = d$status, n_achievable = d$n_achievable)
  })
  names(dense_golden) <- target_labels
  saveRDS(
    list(label = cc$label, frozen_on = as.character(Sys.Date()),
         n_sims = N_SIMS_DENSE, by = BY_DENSE,
         from_size = FROM_SIZE, to_size = TO_SIZE,
         seed = SEED_DENSE,
         dense = dense_golden),
    file = file.path("data", paste0(cc$label, ".golden.rds"))
  )
  cat(sprintf("Golden frozen: data/%s.golden.rds\n\n", cc$label))
}

cat("All gates PASS.\n")
```

# Summary

```{r summary-table}
gate_table <- do.call(rbind, all_rows)
knitr::kable(gate_table[, c("Case", "Target", "Partial", "Dense_N", "Coarse_N",
                              "Rel_diff", "Acc_PASS", "Cov_PASS")],
             caption = "All crossing gates across all cases")
```
